title: Marvell Technology, Inc. (MRVL) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL ) Q3 2024 Earnings Conference Call November 30, 2023 4:45 PM ET Company Participants Ashish Saran - SVP of IR Matt Murphy - Chairman and CEO Willem Meintjes - CFO Conference Call Participants Toshiya Hari - Goldman Sachs Timothy Arcuri - UBS Vivek Arya - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Harsh Kumar - Piper Sandler Tore Svanberg - Stifel Ross Seymore - Deutsche Bank Matt Ramsay - TD Cowen Ambrish Srivastava - BMO Harlan Sur - JPMorgan Christopher Rolland - Susquehanna Srini Pajjuri - Raymond James Chris Caso - Wolfe Research Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to Marvell Technology Inc. title: Marvell Technology (MRVL) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Marvell Technology (MRVL) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.41 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.40 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.57 per share a year ago.

title: Marvell Technology stock falls on uninspired 3Q guidance

title: Marvell's stock rises after earnings, with data-center sales set to accelerate
text: Marvell Technology Inc. expects a sequential acceleration in its data-center business during the current quarter, and its shares were heading higher in Thursday's aftermarket action despite lower-than-expected overall guidance.

title: Marvell Technology, Inc. Reports Third Quarter of Fiscal Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Q3 Net Revenue: $1.419 billion, declined by 8% year-on-year Q3 Gross Margin: 38.9% GAAP gross margin; 60.6% non-GAAP gross margin Q3 Diluted income (loss) per share: $(0.19) GAAP diluted loss per share; $0.41 non-GAAP diluted income per share SANTA CLARA, Calif. , Nov. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL), a leader in data infrastructure semiconductor solutions, today reported financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2024.

title: Is a Beat Likely for Marvell Technology (MRVL) in Q3 Earnings?

title: Marvell Joins Ultra Ethernet Consortium to Drive Network Enhancements for AI and Accelerated Computing
text: Membership reinforces company's commitment to innovation in data center network infrastructure, Ethernet technology and standards-based open ecosystems SANTA CLARA, Calif. , Nov. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL), a leader in data infrastructure semiconductor solutions, today announced it has joined the Ultra Ethernet Consortium (UEC), part of the Linux Foundation's Joint Development Foundation.

title: Marvell: High-Quality Business Attractively Valued
text: Marvell Technology has experienced a 55% year-to-date rally and is still undervalued despite this increase. The company's financial performance has been solid, with revenue almost doubling in the last three fiscal years. Challenges in navigating oversupply and caution among enterprise purchasing managers have impacted revenue, but these issues are expected to be temporary.
